---
title: "INFO 521 — Lecture Slides"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

Lecture decks for **Machine Learning Foundations** (INFO 521). Each deck is a
self-contained reveal.js presentation (dark/light toggle, speaker notes, PDF export).

| Module | Deck | Link |
|--------|------|------|
| **M1 — Foundations & Linear Regression** | Setup & Model | [m1a-setup-and-model](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1a-setup-and-model.html) |
| | Normal Equations | [m1b-normal-equations](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1b-normal-equations.html) |
| | Appendix: Matrix Calculus | [appendix](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/appendix-matrix-calculus.html) |
| | Activity Embed Demo | [index](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/index.html) |
| **M2 — Generalization** | Evaluation & Cross-Validation | [m2a-evaluation-cv](modules/m2-generalization/m2a-evaluation-cv.html) |
| | Bias–Variance & Ridge | [m2b-bias-variance-ridge](modules/m2-generalization/m2b-bias-variance-ridge.html) |
| **M3 — MLE & Uncertainty** | Properties of MLE | [index](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/index.html) |
| | Appendix: Covariance | [appendix](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/appendix-covariance.html) |
| M4–M7 | *(In progress)* | — |

---

[← Course Hub](https://gchism94.github.io/info521){target="_blank"}
